object_a.label: wall feature
object_a.long_form_open_description: Standard white rectangular rocker light switch mounted on the left wall at typical switch height near the bottom of the steps; plate contrasts with the beige wall.
object_a.location_relative_to_other_objects: on the left wall near the base of the stairs and above the baseboard

object_b.label: couch
object_b.description: long dark brown/black leather sectional sofa along left wall
object_b.long_form_open_description: A long, dark brown to black leather reclining sectional placed against the left wall extending from the foreground toward mid-scene. Visible tufted cushions and seam stitching; leather has matte sheen. Occupies most of left third of image at floor level; appears comfortable recliner style.
object_b.location_relative_to_other_objects: Runs parallel to the left staircase wall; lamp and small side table sit at the far right end of the couch (toward center)
